entities.description: A type of clay-rich soil used in the study

entities.description: The geographical region of the study

entities.name: CPL 87119
entities.description: A specific cultivar of pigeonpea

entities.name: H 44

entities.name: LAND CONFIGURATION
entities.description: Systems of land preparation including flat, ridge and furrow, and broadbed and furrow

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where water is supplied only by rain

entities.name: ICRISAT ASIA CENTER
entities.description: The research location in Patancheru, India

entities.name: STRIP PLOT DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental layout used to allocate treatments

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: SEED COTTON YIELD
entities.description: The weight of cotton seeds produced per unit area

entities.name: PIGEONPEA GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of pigeonpea grains produced per unit area

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: The total biomass of the crop after removing water

entities.name: LAND EQUIVALENT RATIO
entities.description: An index used to determine the efficiency of intercropping

entities.name: MONETARY VALUE EQUIVALENT RATIO
entities.description: An index used to determine the economic efficiency of intercropping

entities.name: GROSS RETURNS
entities.description: The total revenue generated from crop production

entities.name: NET MONETARY RETURNS
entities.description: The profit remaining after subtracting costs from gross returns

entities.name: BENEFIT COST RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of total benefits to total costs of production
